results.name: 1500-B-LOOKUP-TRANTYPE
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 1500-B-LOOKUP-TRANTYPE (lines 494-503)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1500-B-LOOKUP-TRANTYPE in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1500-B-LOOKUP-TRANTYPE.                                                  
           READ TRANTYPE-FILE INTO TRAN-TYPE-RECORD                             
              INVALID KEY                                                       
                 DISPLAY 'INVALID TRANSACTION TYPE : '  FD-TRAN-TYPE            
                 MOVE 23 TO IO-STATUS                                           
                 PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                 
                 PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                     
           END-READ                                                             
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

*****************************************************************         
      *    Data-structure for transaction category balance (RECLN = 50)         
      *****************************************************************         
       01  TRAN-CAT-BAL-RECORD.                                                 
           05  TRAN-CAT-KEY.                                                    
              10 TRANCAT-ACCT-ID                       PIC 9(11).               
              10 TRANCAT-TYPE-CD                       PIC X(02).               
              10 TRANCAT-CD                            PIC 9(04).               
           05  TRAN-CAT-BAL                            PIC S9(09)V99.           
           05  FILLER                                  PIC X(22).

results.name: 0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN (lines 430-447)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT TRANTYPE-FILE                                             
           IF  TRANTYPE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING TRANSACTION TYPE FILE'                    
               MOVE TRANTYPE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: CVTRA05Y
results.summary: copybook CVTRA05Y in CVTRA05Y.cpy. comment hint: Data-structure for TRANsaction record (RECLN = 350).
results.content:
*****************************************************************         
      *    Data-structure for TRANsaction record (RECLN = 350)                  
      *****************************************************************         
       01  TRAN-RECORD.                                                         
           05  TRAN-ID                                 PIC X(16).               
           05  TRAN-TYPE-CD                            PIC X(02).               
           05  TRAN-CAT-CD                             PIC 9(04).               
           05  TRAN-SOURCE                             PIC X(10).               
           05  TRAN-DESC                               PIC X(100).              
           05  TRAN-AMT                                PIC S9(09)V99.           
           05  TRAN-MERCHANT-ID                        PIC 9(09).               
           05  TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME                      PIC X(50).               
           05  TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY                      PIC X(50).               
           05  TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP                       PIC X(10).               
           05  TRAN-CARD-NUM                           PIC X(16).               
           05  TRAN-ORIG-TS                            PIC X(26).               
           05  TRAN-PROC-TS                            PIC X(26).               
           05  FILLER                                  PIC X(20).               
      *
      * Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-15-g27d6c6f-68 Date: 2022-07-19 23:16:01 CDT
      *
